scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace=app/main --workspace=app/renderer
scripts.dev: CLAW_DEV=1 concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=app/renderer" "npm run dev --workspace=app/main" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.check.json --noEmit && tsc -p app/renderer/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/browser/tsconfig.json --noEmit
